entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: '疾病类别'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key '疾病类别' → Disease entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (Disease) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Item). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "住院病人出院及死亡人次*-医院管理局辖下医院", "住院病人出院及死亡人次*-惩教署辖下医院", "住院病人出院及死亡人次*-私家医院", "住院病人出院及死亡人次*-合计" (and 4 more). Attach remarks columns ['《疾病和有关健康问题的国际统计分类》第十次修订本的详细序号'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '疾病类别' defines the root entity (Disease).
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
